command:
echo '=== vm-memory (.205) ==='
hostname && uname -r
echo '--- Key services ---'
systemctl is-active 2>/dev/null <<< '' || true
for svc in moreno-memory moreno-runtime; do
  st=$(systemctl is-active $svc 2>/dev/null || echo "not-found")
  echo "  $svc=$st"
done
echo '--- Disk ---'
df -h / | tail -1 | awk '{print "  root: "$3"/"$2" ("$5" used)"}'
echo '--- Moreno repo ---'
cd /home/jose/moreno-ai && git log --oneline -2
echo '--- Delegator ---'
ls -la /home/jose/.local/bin/moreno-delegate 2>/dev/null && /home/jose/.local/bin/moreno-delegate n8n --version || echo "not installed"
echo '--- Task dirs ---'
ls /home/jose/moreno-tasks/ 2>/dev/null
echo DONE_1885
